    SystematicMatrixBenchmark

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    ComputeContext.getDenseLinearAlgebraProvider(Ring<E> ring)
    Gets a dense linear algebra provider.

    ComputeContext.getLinearAlgebraProvider(Ring<E> ring)
    Gets a linear algebra provider suited for the given ring, respecting priorities.

    ComputeContext.getLinearAlgebraProvider(OperationContext ctx, Ring<E> ring)
    Gets a linear algebra provider suited for the given operation context and ring.

    Gets a registered provider by name.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CARMALinearAlgebraProvider<E extends Field<E>>
    Linear Algebra Provider that forces the use of the CARMA algorithm.
    class 
    ColtLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
    Colt Linear Algebra Provider.
    class 
    CommonsMathLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
    Commons Math Linear Algebra Provider.
    class 
    CPUDenseLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
     
    class 
    CPUSparseLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
    Linear Algebra Provider for Sparse Matrices (CPU).
    class 
    DistributedLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
    Linear algebra provider that delegates to distributed algorithms when appropriate.
    class 
    EJMLLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
    EJML Linear Algebra Provider.
    class 
    JBlasLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
    JBlas Linear Algebra Provider.
    class 
    ND4JLinearAlgebraProvider
    ND4J Linear Algebra Provider (Dense).
    class 
    StandardLinearAlgebraProvider<E extends Field<E>>
    Linear Algebra Provider that forces the use of the Standard (Naive/Recursive) algorithm.
    class 
    StrassenLinearAlgebraProvider<E extends Field<E>>
    Linear Algebra Provider that forces the use of the Strassen algorithm.
